textByHash.90e4795ed92fde3899b97ef9c216026097dc214a: Buy me a beer... then I'll teash you what you need to know...
textByHash.5450c99a3bfcece2315eb7582116e51120aff1c6: Yesh Yesh vampyres, I was very good at killing em once...
textByHash.1917df7f4029e206956d2cc5acb027210e08979f: Don't forget to take your stake with you, otherwise he'll just regenerate. Yes, you must have a stake to finish it off... I'd give you a stake but you've got one in your inventory.
textByHash.891e79bf949229bd7c888d7ec5adf28797f1dbb5: Don't forget to take your stake with you, otherwise he'll just regenerate. Yes, you must have a stake to finish it off... I'd give you a stake but you've already got one stored somewhere.
textByHash.dc8b1d7f378e1718c83fd4aaa8d34ad34e0bf06f: Well, you're going to need a stake, otherwise he'll just regenerate. Yes, you must have a stake to finish it off... I just happen to have one with me.
textByHash.ddf5c69b8bd411b5048e079884dbaa692758d47e: You'll need a hammer as well, to drive it in properly, your everyday general store hammer will do. One last thing... It's wise to carry garlic with you, vampyres are somewhat weakened if they can smell garlic. Morgan
textByHash.fa35e8522961e7117da11cba19705b3cc2fb4074: always liked garlic, you should try his house. But remember, a vampyre is still a dangerous foe!
